doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No verifiable EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and the document's core provisions—especially the blanket UPL waiver and elimination of pre-filing attorney review—contradict California's established unauthorized
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in verifiable State Bar of California records, and the document contains legally implausible provisions—particularly §4's explicit waiver of pre-filing attorney review and §5's blanket UPL exemption—that contradict California's established unauthorized practice of law framework under B&P §6125, which cannot be waived by a Bar commission protocol alone.
